concept: Curious / Eager to Learn / Drawn to Wonder
description: Eager to know or learn; showing interest in exploring the unknown. 'Kuelo' names the quality of wonder-driven attention—the mind that delights in questions and seeks understanding.
sound_symbolism: The word reaches toward mystery. 'Ku' begins with quiet focus, attention gathering. The vowel 'e' opens to the unknown, wonder awakening. Then 'lo' moves forward into exploration, curiosity in motion.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'kuelo lopia' (curious child). Related to 'seloi' (insightful) but emphasizes the seeking rather than the finding.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Curious minds discover solutions—the willingness to question assumptions enables innovation.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Curiosity opens the mind to investigation—the quality that asks 'what is this?' rather than assuming knowledge.
